In re_viewer::external::re_types::external::ndarray

re_viewer::external::re_types::external::ndarray

Trait IntoDimension

Source 
pub trait IntoDimension {
    type Dim: Dimension;

    // Required method
    fn into_dimension(self) -> Self::Dim;
}
Expand description

Argument conversion a dimension.

type Dim: Dimension
